arts.ttl: Scott Parker makes Josh Brownhill underrated claim as Burnley skipper quashes Malaysia call-up speculation
arts.sum: Scott Parker believes his free-scoring Burnley midfielder Josh Brownhill doesn’t always get the recognition he deserves.

arts.ttl: Burnley's high spirits and returning key men for Middlesbrough trip after Sheffield United win
arts.sum: Burnley will head to Middlesbrough on Sunday evening in high spirits and with key men back in their squad after their big Boxing Day victory over Sheffield United at Bramall Lane. It left them just one point behind Leeds United in top spot of the Championship ahead of Sunday evening's visit to the Riverside, where Boro are looking to rebound from the disappointment of squandering a three-goal lead against Sheffield Wednesday on Boxing day.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker discusses Burnley's 'nous' against Championship's top teams ahead of Middlesbrough test
arts.sum: Scott Parker is hoping his Burnley side can step up to the challenge once again when they face promotion-chasing Middlesbrough tonight.

arts.ttl: Jonny Howson makes management admission that says a lot about Middlesbrough playing future
arts.sum: It's become an increasingly difficult and cut-throat business as very few managers are given much time in the modern game, making it understandable that more and more ex-players look to go down the punditry route. Though he's started taking his coaching badges alongside a number of Boro teammates, he admits he could, and probably should, do a lot more to prepare for whenever the time comes that he has to hang up the boots.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough v Burnley: Team news, predicted teams and TV details as Clarets look to sign off 2024 on a high
arts.sum: Burnley will be looking to make it four wins in a row when they head to Teesside for their final game of 2024.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's Riverside Stadium voted as one the best away days in the Championship
arts.sum: They compared Championship grounds based on Google review scores, average beer and pie prices, the cost of parking, distances to the nearest train station, and the number of football-related arrests recorded at each ground. Boro's Riverside Stadium ended with a score of 6.4 out of 10, which was tied for third with Millwall's The Den. Only West Brom's The Hawthorns in second and Portsmouth's Fratton Park were ranked better.

Finn Azaz scored two goals and registered an assist on Thursday as Middlesbrough raced into a 3-0 lead against Sheffield Wednesday, but the Teessiders were later reduced to 10 men and only held on for...

arts.ttl: Burnley predicted team to face Middlesbrough as Scott Parker faces rotation dilemma - gallery
arts.sum: It’s another quick turnaround for Burnley as they prepare to travel to Teesside to face Middlesbrough on Sunday looking to back up their big Boxing Day win.

arts.ttl: Jonny Howson shows his true colours in defiant Middlesbrough promotion verdict
arts.sum: The veteran is determined to play his part in helping Boro win promotion back to the Premier League, as Boro’s second-longest serving player now. It’s about mindset and perception; how you look at different positions at certain points through a season.

arts.ttl: The true cost of Middlesbrough's bad habit of throwing away points this season laid bare
arts.sum: You could make a fair argument that Boro dropped all three points here because in a game where they pretty much dominated from start to finish, they failed to make use of their 71% possession or convert any of their 20 shots. The result leaves promotion-chasing Boro one point outside the play-off places and 12 outside the top two - compounding the frustration of Boro’s bad habit in what was a season of opportunity in a weaker Championship race for some years.
